judgeReasoning: The response addresses all three required rubric points: it explains that `group` organizes navigation, llms.txt sections, and AGENTS.md grouping; characterizes `/llms-full.txt` as a monolithic all-docs flattened fallback that is not split by group; and names multiple valid optional frontmatter fields (`deprecated`, `icon`, `experimental`, `canary`, `new`, `draft`, `tags`, `full`, `lastModified`, `lastAuthor`).
